keyFeatures.en: Generate secure passwords from characters, letters, numbers, symbols, and special characters.
keyFeatures.zh: 从字符、字母、数字、符号和特殊字符生成安全密码。

keyFeatures.en: Random password generator to create alphanumeric passwords for any kind of login or other uses.
keyFeatures.zh: 随机密码生成器用于创建适用于任何登录或其他用途的字母数字密码。

description.en: Free tool to generate secure passwords
description.zh: 免费工具生成安全密码

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for password generation.
weaknesses.zh: 密码生成的自定义选项有限。

weaknesses.en: No pricing information provided, making it unclear if there are any paid tiers.
weaknesses.zh: 未提供价格信息，不清楚是否有付费套餐。

targetAudience.en: Anyone who needs to generate secure passwords for login or other uses.
targetAudience.zh: 需要为登录或其他用途生成安全密码的任何人。

positioning.en: A free tool for generating secure passwords with basic customization options.
positioning.zh: 一个提供基本自定义选项的免费安全密码生成工具。
